note: Cross-reference stamp (HK-12/PROD-26): first STAMP of the family — tags v1/v2 are frozen pre-stamp history. v3 added the HK-12 omission rules (ORPHAN-TAG, CONTENT-DRIFT, VENDORABLE-UNREGISTERED, --relax-tags); v3.1 adds ARTIFACTS-PATH (IMPL-8, owner Option B): artifacts entries must be repo-root-relative and resolve at HEAD — bare names fail (the bridge VWB-43 false-drift trap, defused org-wide). Own release note: this very bump was forced by v3.1's CONTENT-DRIFT catching its own uncommitted edit. artifacts is drift-checked (the guard verifies the guard); consumers track their vendored tag via .repin.toml [[tool]].
